questions.text: The powerhouse of the cell is:
questions.explanation: Mitochondria are called the powerhouse of the cell because they produce ATP through cellular respiration.

questions.text: Prokaryotic cells lack a well-defined nucleus.
questions.explanation: Prokaryotic cells (bacteria) lack a membrane-bound nucleus. Their genetic material is in the nucleoid region.

questions.text: The cell theory was proposed by ________ and ________.
questions.explanation: Cell theory was proposed by Matthias Schleiden (1838) and Theodor Schwann (1839).

questions.text: What is the function of ribosomes?
questions.correctAnswer: Ribosomes are the sites of protein synthesis in the cell.
questions.explanation: Ribosomes translate mRNA into proteins. They are found in both prokaryotes and eukaryotes.
